semantic.role: Release gate verification script ensuring critical quality checks before publishing

English.purpose: This script acts as a final verification stage before a release of the ArchSpine project. It sequentially executes a set of essential quality gates—build, unit tests, schema tests, protocol validation, and pack check—and fails if any gate fails, ensuring only validated artifacts proceed to publication.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for maintainers and CI systems responsible for publishing ArchSpine releases. It is a lightweight, imperative script meant to be run locally or in a CI pipeline as the last step before a release.
key_takeaways: The script runs five sequential gates: build, unit tests, schema tests, protocol validation, and pack check.
Any gate failure stops the process and indicates a regression.
It is part of the release process but does not actually publish the package.
